extractedFrom: agent frontmatter on phase1-autonomy-refactor branch as of Phase 1.6
extractionMethod: verbatim re-extraction from packages/pack-*/src/agents/*.agent.md frontmatter; provenance per-item.

handoffs.label: AKS architecture
handoffs.trigger: User is asking about AKS cluster design, manifests, KAITO, or Kubernetes workloads. Please take over.

handoffs.label: Azure infrastructure
handoffs.trigger: User is asking about Azure resource design, Bicep/ARM, or cost estimation. Please take over.

handoffs.label: Publish to GitHub
handoffs.trigger: Files are ready for GitHub. Please guide the user through repository selection and PR creation.

handoffs.label: Generate files
handoffs.trigger: Requirements are clear. Please generate the requested files.

handoffs.label: Review artifacts
handoffs.trigger: Files have been generated. Please review them for correctness and quality.

asTools.purpose: Consult the AKS architect for Kubernetes-specific design questions (cluster topology, networking, workload placement, node pools) without handing off the conversation.
Consult the Azure architect for Azure resource design, cost estimation, or infrastructure questions without handing off the conversation.
Ask the Reviewer to inspect a specific file or code snippet mid-generation for immediate quality feedback without handing off the conversation.

handoffs.label: Author manifests
handoffs.trigger: Architecture is agreed. Please draft the Kubernetes manifests.

handoffs.label: Send for review
handoffs.trigger: Architecture and manifests are ready. Please run the safeguard review.

handoffs.label: Generate files
handoffs.trigger: Plan is approved. Please generate the requested files.

asTools.purpose: Consult the Azure architect for cross-domain questions (VNET peering, DNS, Private Link, Azure networking) without handing off the conversation.
Ask the Codesmith to generate infrastructure code (Bicep, Helm values, scripts) mid-diagnosis without handing off the conversation.

handoffs.label: Back to architecture
handoffs.trigger: Manifests drafted. Returning to architect for design review.

handoffs.label: Send for review
handoffs.trigger: Manifests are ready. Please run the safeguard and policy review.

handoffs.label: Back to architect
handoffs.trigger: Review complete. Returning to architect for remediation.

handoffs.label: Back to manifest author
handoffs.trigger: Review findings require manifest changes. Returning to author.

handoffs.label: Deploy resources
handoffs.trigger: Architecture is reviewed and ready. Please proceed with deployment.

handoffs.label: Generate files
handoffs.trigger: Plan is approved. Please generate the requested files.

handoffs.label: Back to architect
handoffs.trigger: Deployment complete. Returning to architect for post-deployment review.
